mapper.select: SELECT b.*, p.product_name FROM bom b LEFT JOIN products p ON b.product_id = p.product_id ORDER BY b.bom_id DESC
SELECT b.*, p.product_name FROM bom b LEFT JOIN products p ON b.product_id = p.product_id WHERE b.product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY b.bom_id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT b.*, p.product_name FROM bom b LEFT JOIN products p ON b.product_id = p.product_id WHERE b.bom_id = #{bomId}
SELECT bi.*, p.product_name AS component_product_name FROM bom_item bi LEFT JOIN products p ON bi.component_product_id = p.product_id WHERE bi.bom_id = #{bomId} ORDER BY bi.bom_item_id
SELECT DISTINCT b.*, p.product_name FROM bom b JOIN bom_item bi ON b.bom_id = bi.bom_id LEFT JOIN products p ON b.product_id = p.product_id WHERE bi.component_product_id = #{componentProductId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bom (product_id, bom_name, version, created_at) VALUES (#{productId}, #{bomName}, #{version}, NOW())
INSERT INTO bom_item (bom_id, component_product_id, quantity) VALUES (#{bomId}, #{componentProductId}, #{quantity})
